bootstrap.confirmatory_gate: primary expected-L=5 one-sided 95% lower bound of mean daily net return > 0
bootstrap.fold_resampling: per-fold, that fold daily-net-return series is stationary-bootstrapped identically (same expected-L / replications / seed)
bootstrap.governing_source: v0.3 STATIONARY rule, established in v0.2, retained in v0.3, inherited by the owner-signed v1.0 freeze (70108c11); moving-block/L21/2000/seed42 REJECTED as transcription drift per MR002_Bootstrap_Source_Census_v1.0 + owner ruling 2026-07-20 (docs/review/comments.md Ruling 1)
bootstrap.mechanics: Politis-Romano stationary construction: p = 1/expected_L; first source index uniform in [0, n-1]; for every next bootstrap observation, with probability p start a new block at a uniformly selected source index, else advance the prior source index by one; wrap n-1 -> 0 (circular at the series boundary by construction); continue until exactly n observations. Fixed-length moving blocks are NOT substituted.
bootstrap.name: stationary (Politis-Romano, circular) bootstrap of daily net returns
bootstrap.reference_implementation: docs/review/mr002/evaluator/mr002_valoos_metrics.py (Increment 1 v1.2 synthetic-qualified primitive; the qualified evaluator binds the frozen impl)
bootstrap.sensitivity_role: expected-L=10 result reported as robustness evidence ONLY; NOT a separate PASS gate (the frozen v0.3 text does not make it a gate)
bootstrap.statistic: one-sided 95% percentile lower confidence bound of mean daily net return

dsr.note: trials_N=5 owner-ratified per the countersigned ledger (A/B/C + RNG-001 + RNG-EntryLogic). DSR is now executable in the evaluator.
dsr.skew_kurtosis: sample skewness and kurtosis of the config-B net return series
dsr.trial_ledger_candidate: MR002_DSR_TrialLedger_Candidate_v1.0.json (N candidate 4 strict / 5 conservative; completeness unproven; owner countersigns)

gates_frozen.capacity: positive net edge at $10M under the 2% ADV participation cap

diversifier_tag.also_requires: cost-stress + DSR + breadth + trade-concentration + annual-profile + regime gates all pass
diversifier_tag.note: reported classification tag DIVERSIFIER_TIER_MET only; NOT a confirmatory PASS route

gates_frozen.maxdd_sample: validation + sealed OOS COMBINED (sealed OOS also reported separately)
gates_frozen.net_return_sample: sealed OOS at registered gross cap
gates_frozen.parameter_stability: configs A and C both net-profitable
gates_frozen.pbo: DIAGNOSTIC (N=3, underpowered) — NOT a PASS gate

regime_definitions.volatility_axis: SPY trailing 21-session annualized realized vol: High >= 20%, Low < 20%

regime_gates.low_exposure_rule: regimes with < 60 sessions exposure reported n/a, not failed

note: definitions bound verbatim from prereg v1.0.4; no metric computed during Phase 3A
